requirement_topic.en: Electrical Energy Storage System Standards — IEC 62933

summary.en: IEC 62933 is the international series for electrical energy storage systems. For Thailand BESS projects, IEC 62933 may appear as a tender, lender, owner-engineer, or utility due-diligence reference, but exporters should not treat the IEC 62933 series as a Thai whole-system mandatory rule unless a Thai regulator, utility, contract, or permit condition specifically incorporates it.
summary.zh: IEC 62933是电能储能系统国际标准系列。对于泰国BESS项目，IEC 62933可能作为招标、融资方、业主工程师或电网尽调引用，但除非泰国监管机构、电网公司、合同或许可条件明确纳入，不应将IEC 62933系列视为泰国整系统强制规则。
summary.zht: IEC 62933是電能儲能系統國際標準系列。對於泰國BESS項目，IEC 62933可能作為招標、融資方、業主工程師或電網盡調引用，但除非泰國監管機構、電網公司、合同或許可條件明確納入，不應將IEC 62933系列視為泰國整系統強制規則。

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36558 for electrochemical energy storage system grid-connected requirements and GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion battery requirements. These can be mapped to IEC 62933 topics but are not Thai project acceptance evidence by themselves.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36558作为电化学储能系统并网要求，并采用GB/T 36276作为锂离子电池要求。这些文件可映射至IEC 62933主题，但本身不是泰国项目接受证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36558作為電化學儲能系統併網要求，並採用GB/T 36276作為鋰離子電池要求。這些文件可映射至IEC 62933主題，但本身不是泰國項目接受證據。

gap.en: A China system report should be mapped to the IEC 62933 topics requested by the Thai project: system boundary, energy capacity, auxiliary power, safety concept, commissioning, performance testing, documentation, operation and maintenance, and end-of-life responsibilities. The exact IEC 62933 part and edition should be confirmed in the project specification.
gap.zh: 中国系统报告应映射至泰国项目要求的IEC 62933主题：系统边界、能量容量、辅助用电、安全概念、调试、性能测试、文件、运维以及退役责任。具体IEC 62933部分和版本应在项目规格书中确认。
gap.zht: 中國系統報告應映射至泰國項目要求的IEC 62933主題：系統邊界、能量容量、輔助用電、安全概念、調試、性能測試、文件、運維以及退役責任。具體IEC 62933部分和版本應在項目規格書中確認。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-required unless incorporated by a Thai regulator, utility, contract, permit, or tender
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended or project-specific depending on the Chinese standard and grid-connection approval route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62933 is a useful system benchmark for Thailand BESS tenders, but it should be treated as mandatory only when the Thai project or authority expressly incorporates the relevant part and edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62933是泰国BESS招标的有用系统基准，但仅在泰国项目或主管机关明确纳入相关部分和版本时，才应视为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62933是泰國BESS招標的有用系統基準，但僅在泰國項目或主管機關明確納入相關部分和版本時，才應視為強制要求。
